about: Founded in 2003 by Mike Harmon, Apex Roofing started as a two-man crew with a simple promise: do honest work at a fair price. Over two decades later, that promise hasn't changed — but our team has grown to over 40 skilled tradespeople serving central Illinois.
aboutExtra: We've completed more than 5,000 roofing projects, from small leak repairs to full commercial installations. Every job gets the same attention to detail, because your home is your biggest investment.
mission: To protect every home and business we serve with roofing solutions that are built to last — delivered with honesty, professionalism, and respect for your property.
tagline: Built on integrity. Backed by two decades of experience.

services.title: Roof Repair
services.shortDesc: Fast, reliable repairs for leaks, missing shingles, and weather damage.
services.longDesc: From minor leaks to significant damage, our repair services restore the integrity of your roof quickly and affordably. We work with all shingle types, flashing, and ventilation systems.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.shortDesc: Complete tear-off and replacement with premium materials and warranty.
services.longDesc: When repairs aren't enough, our full replacement service includes a complete tear-off, deck inspection, and installation of premium materials backed by manufacturer warranties.

services.title: New Construction
services.shortDesc: Expert installation for new construction projects of any size.
services.longDesc: Building a new home or commercial property? We partner with builders and homeowners to deliver expertly installed roofing systems for projects of any scale.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.shortDesc: Emergency response and insurance claim assistance after storms.
services.longDesc: After severe weather, we provide emergency tarping, full damage assessment, and work directly with your insurance company to streamline the claims process.

services.title: Roof Inspections
services.shortDesc: Thorough roof inspections with detailed reports and recommendations.
services.longDesc: Our certified inspectors provide detailed reports on your roof's condition, remaining lifespan, and any areas of concern — ideal for home sales or annual maintenance.

services.title: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDesc: Flat roof, TPO, EPDM, and metal solutions for commercial buildings.
services.longDesc: We specialize in flat roof systems including TPO, EPDM, and modified bitumen, as well as metal roofing solutions for warehouses, offices, and retail buildings.

testimonials.name: Robert & Lisa M.
testimonials.quote: Apex replaced our entire roof in two days. The crew was professional, cleaned up everything, and the price was exactly what they quoted. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: Patricia K.
testimonials.quote: After the hailstorm, Apex was the first company to respond. They handled everything with our insurance and made the process completely stress-free.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.quote: We got four estimates and Apex wasn't the cheapest — but they were the most thorough. Two years later, not a single issue. Worth every penny.

whyChooseUs: Licensed & fully insured — protecting you and your property
Free detailed estimates with transparent, upfront pricing
Lifetime workmanship warranty on every project

process.title: Inspection
process.desc: We perform a thorough assessment of your roof's condition.

process.title: Estimate
process.desc: You receive a detailed, transparent quote — no hidden fees.

process.title: Build
process.desc: Our skilled crew completes the work on schedule with premium materials.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.desc: We walk the project together to ensure your complete satisfaction.

faqs.q: How long does a roof replacement take?
faqs.a: Most residential roof replacements take 1–3 days, depending on the size, complexity, and weather. We'll give you a specific timeline during your free estimate.
Yes. We partner with several financing providers to offer flexible payment plans with competitive rates. Ask us during your consultation for details.

faqs.q: What roofing materials do you use?
faqs.a: We install asphalt shingles (architectural and 3-tab), metal roofing, cedar shakes, and flat roof systems (TPO, EPDM). We carry products from GAF, CertainTeed, and Owens Corning.

faqs.q: Will my insurance cover storm damage?
faqs.a: In most cases, yes. We work directly with your insurance adjuster and provide all necessary documentation, photos, and estimates to support your claim.

faqs.q: How do I know if I need a repair or full replacement?
faqs.a: We'll perform a free inspection and give you an honest recommendation. If your roof is under 15 years old with localized damage, a repair is usually sufficient. Widespread issues often call for replacement.
All our work comes with a lifetime workmanship warranty. Material warranties vary by manufacturer — typically 25–50 years for architectural shingles.

faqs.q: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We pull all required permits and schedule municipal inspections. It's all included in your project cost.

faqs.q: Can you work on commercial buildings?
faqs.a: Yes. We specialize in flat roof systems for commercial properties including TPO, EPDM, and modified bitumen membranes.

faqs.q: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faqs.a: We recommend annual inspections, especially after severe weather. Regular inspections catch small issues before they become expensive problems.
Yes. We carry full general liability insurance, workers' compensation, and hold a valid roofing contractor license (RCC-123456).
